mainEntity.name: What benefits does workers' comp pay for forklift back injuries in Sandy UT?
mainEntity.text: What benefits does workers' comp pay for forklift back injuries in Sandy UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah comp covers 100% medical (surgery, PT, meds), temporary disability (66.67% wages), permanent partial (impairment rating x body part value), and vocational rehab if back injury from forklift prevents return to warehouse work.

suggestedAnswer.text: Forklift-related back herniations qualify for scheduled PPD awards (e.g., lumbar spine up to 300 weeks). Insurers undervalue chronic pain; independent medical exam counters lowball ratings. Sandy's distribution centers see high claims—secure attorney before accepting settlement to cover future fusion risks.

name: Workers' Comp for Forklift Back Injuries in Sandy UT
description: Utah comp covers 100% medical (surgery, PT, meds), temporary disability (66.67% wages), permanent partial (impairment rating x body part value), and vocational
